subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath established Himself upon the Throne on the Day of Return and hath sent down the Book whereby He hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی استوی علی العرش فی الماب و انزل الکتاب به اظهر
